checks.description: MATCH must only be asserted when the most recent five IN bits form the pattern 1‑0‑0‑1‑1, and must be deasserted otherwise.
checks.pass_condition: MATCH is high only if the sliding window of the last five IN samples equals 1,0,0,1,1; otherwise MATCH is low. No assumption is made about the exact cycle latency between pattern completion and MATCH assertion.
checks.trigger_condition: When any change on IN occurs.

checks.pass_condition: MATCH reflects detection of the 1‑0‑0‑1‑1 pattern without assuming a fixed latency; it may become high any cycle after the last pattern bit is observed and must return low when the pattern is not present.
checks.trigger_condition: When the sliding window of IN satisfies the pattern condition.
